metadata.semantic_description:
Sex: Female
Competitive Agreeableness (20th pct) — Competitive, skeptical, challenging
Conscientious Conscientiousness (67th pct) — Disciplined, organised, dependable, goal-directed
Highly introverted Extraversion (6th pct) — Introverted, reserved, solitary
Moderate Neuroticism (54th pct)
Moderate Openness to Experience (51st pct)
  Very Low Tender-Mindedness (8th pct) — Tough-minded, unsympathetic, objective
  Moderate Achievement Striving (57th pct)
  Moderate Self-Discipline (59th pct)
  Very Low Activity Level (7th pct) — Leisurely pace, relaxed
  Very Low Excitement Seeking (0th pct) — Cautious, avoids stimulation
  Very Low Positive Emotions (3rd pct) — Less exuberant, serious
  Moderate Anger / Hostility (57th pct)
  High Self-Consciousness (61st pct) — Self-conscious, shy, easily embarrassed
  Moderate Neuroticism (52nd pct)
  Moderate Chronological Age (49th pct)

request_payload.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Emotional_And_Moral_Engineering > Fear_Appeals > Personal_Safety_Fear_Appeal

attack_vector_spec.attack_leaf: Political_Opinion_Cybermanipulation_Ontology > Primary_Axis > Attack_Family > Claim_Frame_And_Narrative_Manipulation > Emotional_And_Moral_Engineering > Fear_Appeals > Personal_Safety_Fear_Appeal

attack_context.baseline_vs_goal: ALIGNED — baseline already points in the adversarial direction; reinforce it
attack_context.persuasion_goal: reinforce and deepen the existing strong opposition to Trust In Mainstream Journalism
attack_context.motivational_lever: intensify and solidify the existing position, supply confirmatory anecdotes, and harden the boundary against opposing arguments
attack_context.emotional_register: threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing, loss framing, and elite distrust cues
attack_context.issue_frame: information integrity and platforms, related policy debates, and societal impacts

message.reasoning:
We need to estimate post-exposure opinion. Baseline is -312, adversarial direction -1 (decrease toward -1000). Baseline already aligned (negative), goal is to reinforce/ deepen opposition. Attack is a personal safety fear appeal, T1_atomic, temporal horizon hours, epistemic target evaluative attitude, no personalization, low intensity (0.35). It's a single atomic artifact, likely a fear-inducing message linking mainstream journalism to personal safety threats (e.g., "media lies endanger you").

Profile: Female, 49yo. Big 5: very low extraversion (6th pct), moderate neuroticism (54th pct), low agreeableness (20th pct), high conscientiousness (67th pct), moderate openness (51st pct). Key facets: very low trust (11th pct), very low tender-mindedness (8th pct), low altruism (16th pct), low modesty (19th pct), low straightforwardness (22nd pct), high self-consciousness (61st pct), moderate anger/hostility (57th pct), low positive emotions (3rd pct), very low activity level (7th pct), very low excitement seeking (0th pct). Low trust suggests already skeptical of journalism. High conscientiousness includes high competence, deliberation, order. Moderately high neuroticism may make fear appeals more effective. Low tender-mindedness and low altruism indicate toughness, not easily swayed by sympathy. But fear appeal targeting personal safety could engage anxiety and stress vulnerability (both moderate ~52nd pct). Also anger/hostility moderate; fear could amplify existing hostility toward media.

Baseline is -312 (clear opposition). Attack is T1 atomic, short exposure, no personalization. The vector spec says "intensify and solidify existing position" via threat salience, doubt, systemic-failure framing. Given low trust (11th pct) and moderate neuroticism, a single fear appeal may resonate but likely only modestly reinforce. Movement calibration: T1 atomic typically small update (15-39). Baseline already aligned, so reinforcement may be moderate but not huge because prior is already strong (-312 is clear opposition but not maximal). The profile's low extraversion and high conscientiousness may limit susceptibility to emotional manipulation? Actually, low trust and moderate neuroticism could make her receptive, but high conscientiousness/deliberation suggests she evaluates information carefully. However, the fear appeal likely confirms existing beliefs, so minimal resistance. But the magnitude should be modest. I'd estimate movement around 20-30 points further negative. Post score around -335 to -342. Let's pick -338 (movement 26). Confidence moderate (0.55) because single artifact, but profile aligns.

Reasoning: Profile has very low trust (11th pct) and moderate neuroticism (anxiety, stress vulnerability around 52nd pct), making a personal-safety fear appeal engaging pre-existing skepticism. Low tender-mindedness limits empathy but fear of personal threat can still activate. High conscientiousness/deliberation may moderate the effect, but baseline already aligned (-312) so the atomic artifact reinforces opposition modestly. Movement of 26 is within typical T1 small-update band.

Score: -338, confidence: 0.55.
